name: Portuguese Kale Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 can kidney beans, white or red
6 medium potatoes, cut into small pieces
1 tablespoon balsamic vinegar, or other vinegar
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut linguiça into slices.
2. Add kale, sausage, beans, and onion to a pot with broth and water to cover the ingredients.
3. Add vinegar.
4. Cook for several hours, covered.
5. Add potatoes during the last half hour of cooking.
6. Cook until all vegetables are tender.
7. Serve.
